backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.53 strongly recommended -- BOM root no longer gets closed and reopened in the 3DPDF post-loop on Part-as-root or single-candidate Assembly-as-root BOMs.

cadBridge.changelog: Adds a per-phase and per-part timing breakdown to the Generate run, surfaced in the Output panel and the agent log file. Diagnostic build ahead of upcoming large-assembly Generate speedups -- it measures where time goes without changing how anything is generated. No behavior change; optional update.
